_note: v0.3 Item 4 + Item 6: dom_binding::type_for covers HTMLImageElement (`naturalWidth`, `naturalHeight`), HTMLMediaElement (`duration`, `seeking`, `ended`, `readyState`), and HTMLElement layout (`clientWidth/Height`, `offsetWidth/Height`). Each emits `void ((): void => { EXPR = null as any as TYPE; });` at the bind-site inside the walker's scope — never-called lambda form matches upstream's assignment-direction check (LHS accepts RHS) so `bind:clientWidth={arr[i].optionalWidth}` doesn't fire a spurious `undefined not assignable` FP. Wrong-typed bindings fire TS2322 at the EXPR position via the collect_dom_binding_token_map source-map. Row/column are 0-based.
